overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a first-person approach to a rustic stone cottage in a misty, rainy forest at night, transitioning to exploration of the warm, lantern-lit interior featuring stone walls, wooden beams, and cozy furnishings.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty forest path approaching stone cottage entrance

events.description: camera moves through the cottage doorway from rainy exterior to warm interior

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone cottage entrance through the wet, misty night

entered.detail: rustic stone building with arched doorway and moss-covered walls
steeply pitched roof covered in thick green moss and vegetation
low stone wall running along the path
wooden post with warm glowing lantern illuminating the entrance
tall dark evergreen trees surrounding the clearing

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a dense forest, approaching a rustic stone cottage with a moss-covered roof. A warm lantern glows on the right, reflecting off the wet ground, as the camera moves steadily toward the arched entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy cottage dining room with stone fireplace

agents.ego_description: slowly panning around the cottage interior, observing the dining area, fireplace, and wooden furnishings

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with irregular rocks and wooden mantelpiece
round wooden table with four spindle-back chairs
iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from ceiling beams
exposed dark wooden beams supporting the pitched ceiling
tall wooden cabinet with glass doors against the back wall
arched stone doorway leading to another lit room
circular woven rug beneath the dining table
heavy wooden door with iron hinges on the right wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the cottage, the camera explores a cozy dining area illuminated by warm candlelight from a chandelier and wall sconces. The space features a stone fireplace, wooden furniture, and exposed ceiling beams, with the camera slowly panning right to reveal a wooden door and storage cabinet.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cold, rainy forest exterior into the warm, sheltered sanctuary of a rustic stone cottage. It begins in the dense night air, gliding toward a moss-covered roof and an arched entrance while a glowing lantern reflects off the wet ground. As the camera crosses the threshold, the damp darkness of the woods gives way to a cozy interior illuminated by the soft flicker of candlelight from a chandelier and wall sconces. The scene then expands to reveal a dining area with a stone fireplace and exposed wooden beams before slowly panning right toward a wooden door and storage cabinet.
